description_long: This object consists of two distinct hats displayed on mannequin heads. The first hat is an olive green military-style cap with a flat, wide brim and a prominent red star emblem at the front, evoking Soviet or Chinese military aesthetics. The second hat is a knitted blue beanie with a pointed top, featuring a gray tip and horizontal red and white stripes. The beanie is adorned with Cyrillic text in white, reading 'СПОРТ' (meaning 'SPORT'), and has a ribbed band around the base. Both hats are made from different materials: the cap appears to be fabric or wool felt, while the beanie is clearly knitted from yarn. The hats are shown from multiple angles, highlighting their unique shapes and decorative features.
description: A military-style olive green cap with a red star emblem and a blue knitted beanie with Cyrillic 'СПОРТ' text and a pointed gray tip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red star on the green military cap and the Cyrillic 'СПОРТ' text on the blue beanie.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pointed gray tip of the beanie and the flat, wide brim of the cap.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back seam and gray tip of the beanie and the plain back of the cap.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cap's profile and the beanie's pointed crown and color bands.
